subcodes.first_line: O leaf of certitude! Thou art beneath the protection of that pure soul whose aim, night and day, is the illumination and education of the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه در تحت عصمت نفس زکیه هستی که شب و روز مقصدش روشنی عالم و پرورش
subcodes.subjects: @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @service to others; to the Cause of God
